p.em: Engineered for DB burst protection and immediate hot-path availability.

ul.li: Goal: Minimize Cold-Start Latency for P0 routes.

div.p: Scheduled wait periods ensure DB connection pool and CPU recovery between batch spikes.
P99 latency stabilized within 500ms of startup for Tier 1 hot-path routes.

g.title: Token Bucket Protection for Database Ingress
